description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the clojure:latest Docker image and define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job in the test stage that runs the command clojure -M:test. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs clojure -T:build jar then clojure -T:build deploy and is limited to the master branch with an only rule. Also in the deploy stage add a pages job that runs clojure -X:codox followed by mv ./target/doc ./public, publishes the ./public directory as a Pages artifact, and is also restricted to the master branch.
